evidence-binding: n4 771a2be98f49
change-type: docs

## Summary

Added the D-419-01 Part 3 scheduler-default posture rubric paragraph to the workflow-planner agent profile and its three toml twins.

### Changes made

**agents/workflow-planner.md**: Added a new named paragraph "D-419-01 scheduler-default posture (D-419-01, existing)" immediately after the "Author EFFICIENT DAGs" paragraph. The paragraph:
- Rewards authoring wide independent frontiers (disjoint write sets, no shared file dependencies)
- Names serial as the DEGRADED fallback, not a design goal
- Provides a concrete heuristic: do not add a dep edge between write nodes with disjoint files — leave them as an antichain so the validator derives parallel_safe
- Explicitly states: NEVER add parallel_safe to a node yourself — it is validator-derived ([INV-17]); adding it by hand produces an invalid_annotation refusal
- Cites D-419-01 (existing) as the canonical spec

**plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/workflow-planner.toml**: Added the same rubric content as a D-419-01 SCHEDULER-DEFAULT POSTURE block after the "Author EFFICIENT DAGs" line, following the toml inline prose style (no markdown headers, inline text matching existing rule blocks like NODE LEDGER HEADER MUST BE CANONICAL and AGGREGATOR-COUPLING RULE).

**plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/workflow-planner.toml**: Byte-identical addition as the github edition toml.

**plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/workflow-planner.toml**: Byte-identical addition as the github edition toml.

## Verification: forge-neutral check

```
node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/validate-kaola-workflow-gitlab-contracts.js \
  --forbidden-only plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/workflow-planner.toml
# Output: Kaola-Workflow GitLab forbidden-only check passed (1 file(s))

node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/validate-kaola-workflow-gitea-contracts.js \
  --forbidden-only plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/workflow-planner.toml
# Output: Kaola-Workflow Gitea forbidden-only check passed (1 file(s))
```

Both checks passed. No forge-specific CLI binaries, brand names, or forbidden tokens introduced.

## Verification: toml parity check

```
diff plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/workflow-planner.toml \
     plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/workflow-planner.toml
# IDENTICAL

diff plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/workflow-planner.toml \
     plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/workflow-planner.toml
# IDENTICAL
```

All three toml editions are byte-identical after the edit.
